[[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] '''Neav Samran''' was a heavyset [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Police officer/Legends|officer]] of the [[Lorrd Security Force]]s as of [[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]]. A brown-haired moustached man approaching middle-ages, Samran was an affiliate of [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Nelani Dinn]], the Knight stationed on [[Lorrd/Legends|Lorrd]], his home planet.

During a visit by [[Darth Caedus|Jacen Solo]] and [[Ben Skywalker]], Samran witnessed a rise in Jedi-related crimes and suicide attempts, including sightings of Force ghosts - including [[Borth Pazz]] and [[Ordith Huarr]]. Samran and his officers aided the three Jedi in their resolutions, and impounded [[Lumiya|Brisha Syo]] and her vessel on the advice on young Skywalker.

==Appearances==
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Betrayal]]'' {{1st}}
